error_model.description: Error codes, error response shapes, failure taxonomy
error_model.link_instruction: Reference contracts module for error definitions. Do not define error codes locally.

reason_codes.SEAM_OWNER_VIOLATION: Non-owner module defines content that belongs to the seam owner
reason_codes.SEAM_MISSING_LINK: Module references a seam topic without linking to owner
reason_codes.SEAM_DUPLICATE_DEFINITION: Same definition appears in both owner and non-owner module
